SEQUENCE.COMMENT: ExecWorkflow_wretry - this service is spawned as its own thread on the scheduler instance (AD1, AD2, mill, etc)
it will execute the first step of a workflow STEP01 with retries based on the configuration of the workflow
it is assumed that the first step of the workflow will check for source data, and then if found, execute the
transactionCreate and transactionStart services to get the transaction going

INVOKE.COMMENT: split fw/stepService on a colon to fw/ifcname (the folder name) and fw/svcname

RETRY.COMMENT: 99 - we will repeatedly execute the GET service until it succeeds or the workflow step01's RETRY_COUNT is exhausted

MAP.NAME: $null
MAP.COMMENT: do nothing if the transaction id is null

INVOKE.NAME: $default
INVOKE.COMMENT: lastErrList[%$retries%] DONE INSIDE THE RETRY LOOP ABOVE
Deleting %sWorkflowIID% record from the Active table

Values.value: Deleting %sWorkflowIID% record from the Active table
